006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.html;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
025
026/**
027 * Metadata on bean properties specific to the HTML serializers and parsers pulled from the {@link Html @Html}
028 * annotation on the bean property.
029 *
030 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
031 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/HtmlSupport">HTML Basics</a>
032
033 * </ul>
034 */
035@SuppressWarnings({
036   "rawtypes" // Raw types necessary for HtmlRender class parameter
037})
038public class HtmlBeanPropertyMeta extends ExtendedBeanPropertyMeta {
039
040   static class Builder {
041      boolean noTables;
042      boolean noTableHeaders;
043      HtmlFormat format = HtmlFormat.HTML;
044      BeanInstantiator.Builder<HtmlRender> render = BeanInstantiator.of(HtmlRender.class);
045      String link;
046      String anchorText;
047      String style;
048
049      void findHtmlInfo(Html html) {
050         if (html == null)
051            return;
052         format = html.format();
053         if (html.noTables())
054            noTables = html.noTables();
055         if (html.noTableHeaders())
056            noTableHeaders = html.noTableHeaders();
057         if (html.render() != HtmlRender.class)
058            render.type(html.render());
059         if (! html.link().isEmpty())
060            link = html.link();
061         if (! html.anchorText().isEmpty())
062            anchorText = html.anchorText();
063         if (! html.style().isEmpty())
064            style = html.style();
065      }
066   }
067
068   /**
069    * Default instance.
070    */
071   public static final HtmlBeanPropertyMeta DEFAULT = new HtmlBeanPropertyMeta();
072   private final boolean noTables;
073   private final boolean noTableHeaders;
074   private final HtmlFormat format;
075   private final HtmlRender render;
076
077   private final String link;
078   private final String anchorText;
079   private final String style;
080
081   /**
082    * Constructor.
083    *
084    * @param bpm The metadata of the bean property of this additional metadata.
085    * @param ap The annotation provider.
086    * @param mp HTML metadata provider (for finding information about other artifacts).
087    */
088   public HtmlBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm, AnnotationProvider ap, HtmlMetaProvider mp) {
089      super(bpm);
090
091      var b = new Builder();
092      if (nn(bpm.getInnerField()))
093         ap.find(Html.class, bpm.getInnerField()).forEach(x -> b.findHtmlInfo(x.inner()));
094      if (nn(bpm.getGetter()))
095         ap.find(Html.class, bpm.getGetter()).forEach(x -> b.findHtmlInfo(x.inner()));
096      if (nn(bpm.getSetter()))
097         ap.find(Html.class, bpm.getSetter()).forEach(x -> b.findHtmlInfo(x.inner()));
098
099      format = b.format;
100      noTables = b.noTables;
101      noTableHeaders = b.noTableHeaders;
102      render = b.render.fallback(() -> null).run();
103      link = b.link;
104      anchorText = b.anchorText;
105      style = b.style;
106   }
107
108   private HtmlBeanPropertyMeta() {
109      super(null);
110      this.format = HtmlFormat.HTML;
111      this.noTables = false;
112      this.noTableHeaders = false;
113      this.render = null;
114      this.link = null;
115      this.anchorText = null;
116      this.style = null;
117   }
118
119   /**
120    * Specifies the anchor text for this property.
121    *
122    * <p>
123    * This value is specified via the {@link Html#anchorText() @Html(anchorText)} annotation.
124    *
125    * @return The link string, or <jk>null</jk> if not specified.
126    */
127   public String getAnchorText() { return anchorText; }
128
129   /**
130    * Adds a hyperlink to this value in HTML.
131    *
132    * <p>
133    * This value is specified via the {@link Html#link() @Html(link)} annotation.
134    *
135    * @return The link string, or <jk>null</jk> if not specified.
136    */
137   public String getLink() { return link; }
138
139   /**
140    * Returns the render class for rendering the style and contents of this property value in HTML.
141    *
142    * <p>
143    * This value is specified via the {@link Html#render() @Html(render)} annotation.
144    *
145    * @return The render class, never <jk>null</jk>.
146    */
147   public HtmlRender getRender() { return render; }
148
149   /**
150    * Returns the CSS style string for this property.
151    *
152    * <p>
153    * This value is specified via the {@link Html#style() @Html(style)} annotation.
154    *
155    * @return The CSS style string, or <jk>null</jk> if not specified.
156    */
157   public String getStyle() { return style; }
158
159   /**
160    * Returns whether this bean property should not include table headers when serialized as an HTML table.
161    *
162    * @return
163    *    <jk>true</jk> if the the {@link Html @Html} annotation is specified, and {@link Html#noTableHeaders() @Html(noTableHeaders)} is
164    *    <jk>true</jk>.
165    */
166   public boolean isNoTableHeaders() { return noTableHeaders; }
167
168   /**
169    * Returns the format of this bean property
170    *
171    * @return The value of the {@link Html#format()} annotation.
172    */
173   protected HtmlFormat getFormat() { return format; }
174
175   /**
176    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if {@link #getFormat()} returns {@link HtmlFormat#HTML}.
177    *
178    * @return <jk>true</jk> if {@link #getFormat()} returns {@link HtmlFormat#HTML}.
179    */
180   protected boolean isHtml() { return format == HtmlFormat.HTML; }
181
182   /**
183    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if {@link #getFormat()} returns {@link HtmlFormat#HTML_CDC}.
184    *
185    * @return <jk>true</jk> if {@link #getFormat()} returns {@link HtmlFormat#HTML_CDC}.
186    */
187   protected boolean isHtmlCdc() { return format == HtmlFormat.HTML_CDC; }
188
189   /**
190    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if {@link #getFormat()} returns {@link HtmlFormat#HTML_SDC}.
191    *
192    * @return <jk>true</jk> if {@link #getFormat()} returns {@link HtmlFormat#HTML_SDC}.
193    */
194   protected boolean isHtmlSdc() { return format == HtmlFormat.HTML_SDC; }
195
196   /**
197    * Returns whether this bean property should not be serialized as an HTML table.
198    *
199    * @return
200    *    <jk>true</jk> if the the {@link Html @Html} annotation is specified, and {@link Html#noTables() @Html(noTables)} is
201    *    <jk>true</jk>.
202    */
203   protected boolean isNoTables() { return noTables; }
204
205   /**
206    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if {@link #getFormat()} returns {@link HtmlFormat#PLAIN_TEXT}.
207    *
208    * @return <jk>true</jk> if {@link #getFormat()} returns {@link HtmlFormat#PLAIN_TEXT}.
209    */
210   protected boolean isPlainText() { return format == HtmlFormat.PLAIN_TEXT; }
211
212   /**
213    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if {@link #getFormat()} returns {@link HtmlFormat#XML}.
214    *
215    * @return <jk>true</jk> if {@link #getFormat()} returns {@link HtmlFormat#XML}.
216    */
217   protected boolean isXml() { return format == HtmlFormat.XML; }
218}
